onCreateCommand: sudo mkdir -p --mode=0755 /usr/share/keyrings && curl -fsSL https://pkg.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-public-v2.gpg | sudo tee /usr/share/keyrings/cloudflare-public-v2.gpg >/dev/null && echo 'deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/cloudflare-public-v2.gpg] https://pkg.cloudflare.com/cloudflared any main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/cloudflared.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install cloudflared && sudo apt-get install -y bsdutils && sudo apt-get install -y tigervnc-tools
